ddls:
CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the machinery system */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the system is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machinery system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Current status of the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system */,
  "sensor_count" INTEGER /* Number of sensors associated with the system */,
  "last_update" REAL /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the facility */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility manager */,
  "manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the facility manager */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last facility inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled facility inspection */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, supervisor) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" REAL /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" REAL /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the facility where the system is located
Date when the system was installed
Date of the last maintenance performed
Date of the next scheduled maintenance
Number of sensors associated with the system
Timestamp of the last data update
Contact information for the facility manager
Date of the last facility inspection
Date of the next scheduled facility inspection
Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, supervisor)
Reference to the facility the user is associated with
Preferred language for the user interface
